title: HUNT Decoder v0 / Chained-Read Foundations
description: Pack 2 (Phases γ + δ-A). Real HUNT (HUNT_THE_ADVANTAGE) base scenarios — chained reads where the first action forces a defensive reaction and the second freeze's choice exploits the new geometry. D1 ships the pre-set mismatch; D2 introduces the user-forced switch; D3 (phase δ-A) introduces decoy actions — a dummy first action that baits the defense, and the real read is what the bite left open. D1 also ships a left-wing mirror (HUNT-01-MIRROR) so mastery transfer across the floor is exercised. Concept-level prerequisites live on the Academy lesson `chained-reads-intro`.
